description: Synthetic governance fixture for Todo 4 — exercises the placeholder-contact branch of the verify-task.mjs Todo 4 governance cross-check. The script detects the SECURITY.md placeholder line ("Owner contact not yet configured") and returns GOVERNANCE NOT READY: PLACEHOLDER_CONTACT with exit code 2. The fixture's owner record is intentionally not authoritative; it only documents the fixture case so a future run is reproducible.
